situation_read: This is an ownership clarification moment, not an invitation to quietly become the tracker.

content.label: Preserve the relationship, protect the lane
content.body: Morgan, quick heads-up: I see one launch readiness risk around dependency tracking. I can summarize what I am seeing, but can you confirm whether Jordan owns the tracker from here? That will help me keep my update crisp and avoid duplicating work.

strategy: The draft gives Morgan early warning while making ownership explicit.
tradeoffs: It protects Alex from absorbing coordination work, but it may require Morgan to resolve ownership sooner.
recommendation: Use this version if the goal is to stay helpful without becoming the default owner.
risks: Morgan may still ask Alex to coordinate.
